name: syntax-typography-starter
description: A typography-first website starter and lightweight design system.

scripts.lint:js: eslint js/config/font-pairs.js js/utilities/theme-toggle.js js/utilities/font-switcher.js js/components/navigation.js js/components/modal.js js/components/web-components.js js/main.js scripts tests eslint.config.js playwright.config.js
scripts.lint:css: stylelint css/tokens.css css/themes.css css/style.css css/components/a11y.css css/components/buttons.css css/components/controls.css css/components/modal.css demo/demo.css
scripts.format: prettier --write index.html demo/index.html demo/demo.css css/tokens.css css/themes.css css/style.css css/components/a11y.css css/components/buttons.css css/components/controls.css css/components/modal.css js/config/font-pairs.js js/utilities/theme-toggle.js js/utilities/font-switcher.js js/components/navigation.js js/components/modal.js js/components/web-components.js js/main.js scripts tests package.json eslint.config.js playwright.config.js .stylelintrc.json .prettierrc.json .github/workflows/ci.yml README.md docs/STYLE_GUIDE.md v2-ideas.md CHANGELOG.md site.webmanifest
scripts.format:check: prettier --check index.html demo/index.html demo/demo.css css/tokens.css css/themes.css css/style.css css/components/a11y.css css/components/buttons.css css/components/controls.css css/components/modal.css js/config/font-pairs.js js/utilities/theme-toggle.js js/utilities/font-switcher.js js/components/navigation.js js/components/modal.js js/components/web-components.js js/main.js scripts tests package.json eslint.config.js playwright.config.js .stylelintrc.json .prettierrc.json .github/workflows/ci.yml README.md docs/STYLE_GUIDE.md v2-ideas.md CHANGELOG.md site.webmanifest
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:css
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build && npm run test:e2e
